settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure how you want to be notified about upcoming payments

email.title: Email Notifications
email.enableDesc: Send payment reminders to your email
email.dailyDesc: Receive a summary of today's payments
email.weeklyDesc: Receive a weekly summary of your subscriptions

push.title: Browser Push Notifications
push.desc: Receive alerts directly in your browser
push.enableDesc: Get notified even when you're not on the app

webhook.title: Webhook Integration
webhook.enableDesc: POST payment data to your webhook URL
webhook.urlDesc: We'll send a POST request with payment details to this URL

default.title: Default Reminder Settings
default.enableDesc: Enable reminders by default for new subscriptions
default.daysDesc: New subscriptions will be set to remind you this many days before the payment is due

budget.title: Budget Limits
budget.desc: Set a monthly budget to get notified if you exceed it
budget.label: Monthly Budget
budget.help: Leave blank if you don't want budget alerts
